title: Garlic Butter Steak Bites
description: Quick seared New York strip steak cubes cooked in garlic butter and finished with fresh parsley.

items: 2 lb (1 kg) New York strip steaks, trimmed and cut into 1-inch (2.5-cm) cubes
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
Chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley leaves for garnish (optional)

instructions: Place the steak cubes in a bowl and season all over with salt and pepper. Toss to coat.
In a large cast-iron frying pan over medium-high heat, melt half the butter. Add the steak and sear until nicely browned on one side, about 2 minutes.
Flip the pieces, add the garlic, and sear the other side, 1-2 minutes longer.
Add the remaining butter and stir until the steak cubes are medium-rare, 30-60 seconds longer.
Transfer the steak to a plate, sprinkle with parsley, if using, and serve at once.
